caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned behind a wooden table, facing toward the left side of the frame. In front of him is a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. Behind him, a white backdrop features repeated logos that read "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, a black container is visible with a label that says "TALK OUT". To his left, a black equipment case is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary, maintaining a neutral expression while looking off-camera to the left. There is virtually no movement or change in the scene across the frames.
